tasks.label: check-public-tunnel
args: $cloud = Get-Process cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $caddy = Get-Process caddy -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($caddy) { Write-Output 'CADDY_RUNNING=YES' } else { Write-Output 'CADDY_RUNNING=NO' }; if ($cloud) { Write-Output 'CLOUDFLARED_RUNNING=YES'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'cloudflared' } | Select-Object Name, ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List } else { Write-Output 'CLOUDFLARED_RUNNING=NO' }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8080/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output ('LOCAL_HTTP=' + [int]$r.StatusCode) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { Write-Output ('LOCAL_HTTP=' + [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__) } else { Write-Output ('LOCAL_HTTP_ERROR=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }

tasks.label: check-public-tunnel-2
tasks.command: $cloud = Get-Process cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $caddy = Get-Process caddy -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($caddy) { Write-Output 'CADDY_RUNNING=YES' } else { Write-Output 'CADDY_RUNNING=NO' }; if ($cloud) { Write-Output 'CLOUDFLARED_RUNNING=YES'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*cloudflared*' } | Select-Object Name, ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List } else { Write-Output 'CLOUDFLARED_RUNNING=NO' }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8080/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output ('LOCAL_HTTP=' + [int]$r.StatusCode) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { Write-Output ('LOCAL_HTTP=' + [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__) } else { Write-Output ('LOCAL_HTTP_ERROR=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }
